title: Classic Ukrainian Borscht
description: A hearty beet-based borscht recipe with tender beef and a variety of vegetables, inspired by traditional Ukrainian cuisine.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onions and minced garlic to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced beets, carrots, and browned beef back to the pot.
Pour in the vegetable broth and add the canned tomatoes, salt, black pepper, and sugar.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill if desired.
